raw_consumer_statement:
Starting in XX/XX/XXXX, I noticed a charge on my account that I did not make. I called Barclay Card and notified them on XX/XX/XXXX. They lady on the phone assured me that they would look at it and get back with me, They didn't. I called again on XX/XX/XXXX. The lady said " Yes '' we have a problem but it should be solved in 2-3 days. At this time I got locked out of the website and could no longer access it. On XX/XX/XXXX. I was able to access the website for a few minutes and at that time their where about {$8000.00} in fraud charges. I closed the account. I have never been able to get back on the site and they won't give me an answer why, except to say your account is flagged. It was recommended that I file a police report, I did on XX/XX/XXXX. I met with the Detective XXXX of the XXXX XXXX Police Dept. XXXX. He subpoena the records and we went through them on XX/XX/XXXX. easily identified the fraud charges. I sent the police report in to the legal dept of Barclay Card. XXXX. I got an automated response telling that they would contact me, The next day I got an email from Barclay saying a response is in the website, that I can't get in. I called again today and was told we had to wait on " Legal '' My credit score has dropped XXXX points in the past 2-3 months. I can't even get in the website to make a payment. 

Please help. 
XXXX XXXX
